headline: Google’s new anything-to-anything AI model is wild
summary: Google introduces a groundbreaking AI model for versatile media creation. It allows transforming any input into any other output, such as video from text. This expands on previous Gemini capabilities, offering advanced creative potential.

headline: Google’s AI search is so broken it can ‘disregard’ what you’re looking for
summary: Google's AI Overviews are experiencing significant malfunctions. A search for 'disregard' returned a chatbot response instead of a summary. This issue highlights current flaws in Google's AI search functionality.

headline: Twelve South’s AirFly Pro 2 has hit one of its best prices ahead of summer travel
summary: Twelve South's AirFly Pro 2 Bluetooth adapter is now available at a record low price. This gadget lets you use wireless headphones with in-flight entertainment systems. The deal arrives just in time for the summer travel season.

headline: Meta’s Forum is part Reddit, part Facebook, and part Google AI Overview
summary: Meta launches 'Forum,' a new app blending social and AI features. It moves Facebook Groups into a dedicated app, complete with an AI chatbot. Forum aims to offer an alternative to traditional search and social platforms.

headline: I Found the Most Interesting Shrek Merch Hidden in the Internet’s Swamp
summary: Discover a curated list of the most fascinating Shrek merchandise online. The article celebrates Shrek's enduring popularity 25 years after its debut. Perfect for fans anticipating Shrek 5 and collecting unique memorabilia.

headline: Rick and Morty Returns for Season 9 - Here's When You Can Watch New Episodes
summary: Rick and Morty is officially set to return for its ninth season. New episodes will be available to stream sooner than ever before. Fans can eagerly anticipate the next installment of the popular animated series.

headline: The iBuypower Gaming PC With AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D CPU and 5090 GPU Drops Below $5,000
summary: iBuypower is offering a high-end gaming PC for under $5,000. It features an AMD Ryzen 9 9950X3D CPU and a powerful RTX 5090 GPU. The system boasts 32GB DDR5 RAM, a massive 4TB SSD, and a 3-year warranty.

headline: Spartacus: House of Ashur Reportedly Canceled After Just 1 Season
summary: Steven S. DeKnight's 'Spartacus: House of Ashur' has reportedly been canceled. The Starz series will conclude after airing only one season. This news comes as a disappointment to fans of the prequel series.

headline: France suspends extra EU border checks at Dover after hours-long queues
summary: France has temporarily halted extra EU border checks at the Port of Dover. The suspension aims to alleviate hours-long queues and reduce processing times. New entry and exit systems had caused significant travel delays.

headline: At least 90 killed in Chinese coal mine explosion, state media reports
summary: A devastating coal mine explosion in China has claimed at least 90 lives. The incident in Shanxi province marks the country's worst mining disaster in 16 years. State media confirms the high casualty count amidst ongoing recovery efforts.

headline: Hot weather to intensify in UK over bank holiday weekend
summary: The UK is bracing for an intensification of hot weather over the bank holiday weekend. Amber heat health alerts have been issued for the Midlands, eastern, and south-east England. Residents are advised to take precautions as temperatures rise.

headline: Putin vows retaliation after accusing Ukraine of hitting student dormitory
summary: President Putin has vowed retaliation, accusing Ukraine of striking a student dormitory. Ukraine, in turn, claims to have hit Russia's elite Rubicon drone military unit. Tensions escalate as both sides exchange accusations over recent attacks.
